title: Builder Pattern

statement.markdown:
## Pizza Builder

### Requirements numbered list
1. The PizzaBuilder class should have a method that returns a Pizza object.
2. The Pizza object should have properties for size, crust type, sauce, cheese, toppings.
3. The Pizza class should have a method to calculate the total cost.
4. A client should be able to use the PizzaBuilder to create different types of pizzas.

constraints: Do not use external libraries or frameworks.
The PizzaBuilder class should not have any instance variables.
The Pizza class should not have any static variables.
